title: chat_delta_sync: duplicate fallback-to-full-reload code paths
description: chat_delta_sync contains two structurally identical code paths that fall back to load_chats: one for has_more_changes (lines 726-738) and one for cannotCalculateChanges (lines 703-715). Both call load_chats, map Ok(s) to Some(s), and map Err(e) to send_event(Error) + None. Even the error message strings are the same ('Failed to reload chats'). If error handling or logging is added to one path (e.g. a metrics counter, a log statement, a retry), it must be manually applied to the other. Extract a shared inline helper or use a labelled block: async fn full_reload_fallback(client, api_url, account_id, tx, ctx, error_prefix) -> Option<String>. The two match arms then each call this helper with a flag or message distinguishing has_more_changes from cannotCalculateChanges.
